item.text: {"verdicts":[{"finding_id":"F-008","verdict":"partially_resolved","note":"The redraft loop now accumulates input tokens, output tokens, and cost across rejected and accepted draft attempts before the orchestrator writes them to step/run totals. However the new accumulator drops cached_input_tokens, so that usage field is still omitted from manifest totals for all draft attempts."}],"new_findings":[],"summary":"F-008 is only partially resolved because cached-token usage is not accumulated."}
